ZAVORA FASHION

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about shopping with Zavora Fashion. Still need help? Contact our Customer Experience Team.

ShoppingShippingReturnsProductsPaymentsAccount

Shopping

Select your preferred size, add the item to your bag, and proceed through secure checkout.

Orders may only be changed or cancelled before they enter processing.

Yes. Every product offered by Zavora Fashion is quality inspected before shipment.

Shipping

Orders are typically processed within 1-3 business days. Standard USA delivery usually arrives within 3-5 business days after dispatch.

Yes. Free standard shipping is available on eligible USA orders.

Yes. Once your order ships, you receive tracking by email and can also use the Track Order page.

Returns & Refunds

Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery when items remain unworn, unwashed, undamaged, and all original tags are attached.

Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-10 business days after inspection.

Exchanges are available for eligible products, subject to stock availability.

Products

Most Limited Edition collections are produced in small quantities and may not be restocked once sold out.

Each product page includes a Size Guide to help you select the best fit.

Follow the care instructions provided on the garment label to maintain quality and longevity.

Payments & Account

We accept secure payments through the supported providers shown during checkout.

Yes. Transactions are protected using SSL encryption and secure payment processing.

No. Guest checkout is available, although an account makes order tracking easier.

Use the Forgot Password option on the login page to securely reset your password.

We're committed to providing a seamless shopping experience from your first visit to the delivery of every order.
Need Assistance?
